verdict: Cetaphil's gentle cleanser prioritizes safety with minimal surfactants and added glycerin for hydration. While excellent for sensitive skin, the lack of cleansing actives limits effectiveness compared to CeraVe's hydrating cleanser.

_research.name: Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser
pros: Ultra-gentle formula ideal for barrier-compromised skin
_research.con: Less effective cleansing performance than modern formulas; feels more like a cleansing milk than cleanser.
